title: Death Locations
description: On death, sends a coloured message to the player with the location.
body:
# What is this plugin?
Simplistic plugin that sends you a message with your death location.

# Features
- Sends players a message on death with the location.
- More features as they are suggested.

The current version of the plugin was intentionally kept simple to reduce the likelihood of it breaking between different Minecraft versions.

# Setup:
- Download the jar file.
- Place the file into your server's plugin folder.
- Start the server and Enjoy!

## Stats:
https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/DeathLocations
